<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%","minHeight":400}'>
    <title>Playground</title>

    <!-- Type Definitions -->
    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
    // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
    // =============================================================================

    /**
     * Area item within an app
     */
    interface AreaItem {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        previewImage?: string;
        previewClass?: string;
    }

    /**
     * App configuration
     */
    interface AppItem {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        previewType: 'investment' | 'profiles';
        demoUrl?: string;
        areas: AreaItem[];
    }

    /**
     * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
     */
    interface MyopInitData {
        apps: AppItem[];
        areas?: AreaItem[];
        previewImages?: {
            profiles?: string;
            investment?: string;
        };
    }

    /**
     * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
     */
    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
        'app_selected': { appId: string };
        'area_selected': { appId: string | null; areaId: string };
        'build_by_area_clicked': Record<string, never>;
        'demo_opened': { appId: string; demoUrl: string };
        'size-requested': {
            width?: number | null;
            height?: number | null;
            minWidth?: number | null;
            maxWidth?: number | null;
            minHeight?: number | null;
            maxHeight?: number | null;
            required?: boolean;
        };
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
    // =============================================================================

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
        action: K,
        payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>

    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        /* Base Styles - Required for Myop components */
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: auto;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #1a1a1a;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Font smoothing for antialiased text rendering */
        body {
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
            min-width: 0;
            padding-top: 0;
        }

        /* Mobile Dashboard Title - Hidden on desktop */
        .mobile-dashboard-title {
            display: none;
            padding: 19px 20px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: normal;
            color: #1C1B1F;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Header Section - Fixed */
        .header {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex;
            padding: 28px 20px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            border-radius: 0;
            border: none;
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.4) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.4) 95.9%);
            margin: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--Grey-5, #F5F3F3);
        }

        .header-content {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
            width: 100%;
            min-width: 0;
            max-width: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .header-logo {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
        }

        .header-logo svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Star blink animations */
        @keyframes starBlink1 {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.2;
            }
        }

        @keyframes starBlink2 {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.15;
            }
        }

        @keyframes starBlink3 {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.25;
            }
        }

        @keyframes starBlink4 {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.1;
            }
        }

        .header-logo svg path[fill^="url(#paint5"] {
            animation: starBlink1 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .header-logo svg path[fill^="url(#paint6"] {
            animation: starBlink2 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .header-logo svg path[fill^="url(#paint7"] {
            animation: starBlink3 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .header-logo svg path[fill^="url(#paint8"] {
            animation: starBlink4 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .header-text {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
            min-width: 0;
            flex: 1;
            max-width: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .header-title {
            color: #1C1B1F;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        .header-subtitle {
            color: #1C1B1F;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
        }

        /* Main Content - Scrollable */
        .main-content {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            min-height: 0;
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 19px 20px 0 20px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .section-title {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        /* Cards Grid */
        .cards-grid {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 4px;
            margin: -4px;
        }

        .card {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1 1 180px;
            min-width: 150px;
            max-width: 180px;
            width: 180px;
            height: 151px;
            padding: 8px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            background: var(--light-grad, linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%));
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            box-sizing: border-box;
            position: relative;
        }

        .card:hover {
            border-color: #8039FD;
            /* background: rgba(128, 57, 253, 0.05); */
        }

        .card.selected {
            border-color: #8039FD;
            background: rgba(128, 57, 253, 0.05);
            transform: scale(1.02);
        }

        .card-preview {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            overflow: visible;
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 4px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }


        .card-preview img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        /* Complexity Badge */
        .complexity-badge {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            padding: 2px 8px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            border-radius: 8px;
            height: 20px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /* Preview Demo Button - Top Right Corner */
        .preview-demo-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            padding: 0;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0.8);
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .preview-demo-btn svg {
            width: 11px;
            height: 11px;
        }

        .preview-demo-btn svg path {
            stroke: #3E3D3E;
        }

        .card:hover .preview-demo-btn {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: scale(1);
        }

        .preview-demo-btn:hover {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            border-color: #DECCFF;
        }

        /* Custom Tooltip */
        .preview-demo-btn::after {
            content: 'View live app';
            position: absolute;
            top: calc(100% + 6px);
            right: 0;
            padding: 6px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            background: #FFF;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease 0.8s, visibility 0.15s ease 0.8s;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .preview-demo-btn:hover::after {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        /* Investment App Preview */
        .preview-investment,
        .preview-profiles {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .preview-profiles svg {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
        }

        .preview-investment svg {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
        }

        /* Star fade animations */
        @keyframes starFade1 {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            50% {
                opacity: 0.3;
            }
        }

        @keyframes starFade2 {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            50% {
                opacity: 0.25;
            }
        }

        @keyframes starFade3 {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            50% {
                opacity: 0.35;
            }
        }

        .preview-profiles svg .star-s2c-1 {
            animation: starFade1 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-profiles svg .star-s2c-2 {
            animation: starFade2 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-profiles svg .star-s2c-3 {
            animation: starFade3 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-profiles svg .star-s2c-4 {
            animation: starFade1 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-investment svg .star-rwp-1 {
            animation: starFade1 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-investment svg .star-rwp-2 {
            animation: starFade2 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-investment svg .star-rwp-3 {
            animation: starFade3 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .preview-investment svg .star-rwp-4 {
            animation: starFade1 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* Build by Area Card - Horizontal layout matching app cards */
        .card-build-area {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1 1 180px;
            min-width: 150px;
            max-width: 180px;
            padding: 8px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .card-build-area:hover {
            border-color: #8039FD;
        }

        .card-build-area.selected {
            border-color: #8039FD;
        }

        .card-build-area.selected .icon svg path,
        .card-build-area:hover .icon svg path {
            stroke: #8039FD;
        }

        .card-build-area.selected .label,
        .card-build-area:hover .label {
            color: #8039FD;
        }

        .card-build-area .icon-container {
            width: 100%;
            height: 120px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: #F5F3F3;
            border-radius: 4px;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        .card-build-area .icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
        }

        .card-build-area .icon svg path {
            transition: stroke 0.2s ease;
        }

        .card-build-area .label {
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
            overflow: hidden;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        /* Card Content Section - wrapper for label and badge */
        .card-content-section {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
            align-items: center;
            width: 100%;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        /* Card Label */
        .card-label {
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
            overflow: hidden;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* Area Selection Section */
        .area-section {
            margin-top: 32px;
            display: none;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .area-section.visible {
            display: block;
            animation: areaSlideIn 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
        }

        @keyframes areaSlideIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-16px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* Area Section Header - Title + CTA Link side by side */
        .area-section-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 16px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            flex-wrap: nowrap;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .area-section-title {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 14px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .area-cards-grid {
            display: flex;
            padding: 18px 0 20px 0;
            align-items: flex-start;
            align-content: flex-start;
            gap: 24px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            border-radius: 16px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow: hidden;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .area-card {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1 1 180px;
            min-width: 150px;
            max-width: 180px;
            padding: 16px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 0;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            border-radius: 12.125px;
            transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
            height: 118px;
        }

        .area-card:hover {
            border-color: #8039FD;
            background: rgba(128, 57, 253, 0.02);
        }

        .area-card-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 3.25px;
            width: 100%;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .area-card-header {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6.5px;
            width: 100%;
            height: 19.5px;
        }

        .area-card-title {
            flex: 1;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .area-card-checkmark {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            display: none;
        }

        .area-card-checkmark svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .area-card-description {
            width: 100%;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }

        /* Area CTA Section - Sticky to bottom (now just the description) */
        .area-cta-section {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 16px 20px 22px 20px;
            border-top: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        .area-cta-description {
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            margin-top: 30px;
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--Dark-grediant, linear-gradient(266deg, #FF5B14 -2.48%, #715EF0 109.11%));
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease, height 0.25s ease, margin 0.25s ease;
        }

        .area-cta-description.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            height: 0;
            margin: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }


        /* ============================================
           RESPONSIVE DESIGN - Media Queries
           Based on Figma designs at: 838px, 834px, 744px, 430px
           ============================================ */

        /* Large screens - 838px and above (default styles above) */
        /* Cards: 180px fixed width, grid layout */

        /* Medium-large screens - 744px to 837px */
        @media (max-width: 837px) {
            .header {
                padding: 25px 20px;
                margin: 0;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
            }

            .cards-grid {
                gap: 24px;
            }

            .card {
                flex: 1 1 180px;
                min-width: 150px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }

            .card-build-area {
                flex: 1 1 180px;
                min-width: 150px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }

            .area-cards-grid {
                gap: 24px;
            }

            .area-card {
                flex: 1 1 180px;
                min-width: 150px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }
        }

        /* Medium screens - 600px to 743px */
        @media (max-width: 743px) {
            .header {
                padding: 20px 16px;
                margin: 0;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
            }

            .header-logo {
                width: 56px;
                height: 56px;
            }

            .cards-grid {
                gap: 20px;
            }

            .card {
                flex: 1 1 160px;
                min-width: 140px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }

            .card-build-area {
                flex: 1 1 160px;
                min-width: 140px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }

            .area-section {
                margin-top: 24px;
            }

            .area-cards-grid {
                gap: 20px;
            }

            .area-card {
                flex: 1 1 180px;
                min-width: 150px;
                max-width: 180px;
            }

        }

        /* Small screens - 430px to 767px (Mobile horizontal card layout) */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            .mobile-dashboard-title {
                display: block;
            }

            .header-title {
                display: none;
            }

            .header {
                padding: 20px;
                margin: 0;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
            }

            .header-content {
                gap: 16px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }

            .header-logo {
                width: 60px;
                height: 60px;
            }

            .main-content {
                padding: 8px 0 0 0;
            }

            .section-title {
                padding: 12px 16px;
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            /* Horizontal card layout for mobile */
            .cards-grid {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 16px 24px;
                padding: 0 20px 20px 20px;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
            }

            .card {
                flex: none;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
                min-width: 0;
                flex-direction: row;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;
                padding: 8px;
            }

            .card-preview {
                width: 167px;
                min-width: 100px;
                max-width: 181px;
                height: 120px;
                flex-shrink: 0;
            }

            .card-content-section {
                align-items: flex-start;
                gap: 8px;
            }

            .card-label {
                font-size: 16px;
                font-weight: 700;
                line-height: 24px;
                -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
                line-clamp: 2;
                min-width: 0;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .complexity-badge {
                flex-shrink: 0;
            }

        function renderDemoButton(demoUrl, appId) {
            if (!demoUrl) return '';
            return '<button class="preview-demo-btn" data-demo-url="' + demoUrl + '" data-app-id="' + appId + '">' + ICONS.externalLink + '</button>';
        }

        function renderAppCard(app) {
            var previewContent = '';
            if (app.previewType === 'investment') {
                previewContent = renderInvestmentPreview();
            } else if (app.previewType === 'profiles') {
                previewContent = renderProfilesPreview(app.id);
            }

            // Show demo button for both "Redesign with Prompt" and "Screenshot to code" cards
            var shouldShowDemo = app.id === 'profiles-app' || app.id === 'screenshot-to-code';
            var demoButton = shouldShowDemo ? renderDemoButton(app.demoUrl, app.id) : '';

            // Add complexity badge for specific cards
            var complexityBadge = '';
            if (app.id === 'profiles-app') {
                complexityBadge = '<span class="complexity-badge">Beginners</span>';
            } else if (app.id === 'screenshot-to-code') {
                complexityBadge = '<span class="complexity-badge">Intermediate</span>';
            }

            return '<div class="card" data-id="' + app.id + '" data-type="app">' + demoButton + '<div class="card-preview">' + previewContent + '</div><div class="card-content-section"><div class="card-label">' + app.name + '</div>' + complexityBadge + '</div></div>';
        }

        function renderBuildByAreaCard() {
            return '<div class="card card-build-area" data-type="build-area"><div class="icon-container"><div class="icon">' + ICONS.layers + '</div></div><div class="label">Build by area</div></div>';
        }

        function renderAreaCard(area, isTask) {
            // Only show checkmark for claimed areas (signup)
            var checkmarkHtml = area.claimed ? '<span class="area-card-checkmark">' + ICONS.checkmark + '</span>' : '';

            // Get description text
            var descriptionText = area.description || '';

            // Remove complexity from description if it's duplicated
            if (descriptionText.includes(' - ')) {
                var parts = descriptionText.split(' - ');
                descriptionText = parts[1] || parts[0];
            }

            // Build description HTML only if description exists
            var descriptionHtml = descriptionText ? '<div class="area-card-description">' + descriptionText + '</div>' : '';

            return '<div class="area-card" data-id="' + area.id + '" data-type="area">' +
                '<div class="area-card-content">' +
                    '<div class="area-card-header">' +
                        '<div class="area-card-title">' + area.name + '</div>' +
                        checkmarkHtml +
                    '</div>' +
                    descriptionHtml +
                '</div>' +
            '</div>';
        }

        function selectApp(appId) {
            // Toggle if clicking the same card again
            if (selectedAppId === appId) {
                selectedAppId = null;
                var allCards = cardsContainer.querySelectorAll('.card');
                allCards.forEach(function(card) { card.classList.remove('selected'); });
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');
                areaCardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
                // Show CTA description again when card is deselected
                var ctaDescription = document.querySelector('.area-cta-description');
                if (ctaDescription) {
                    ctaDescription.classList.remove('hidden');
                }
                return;
            }

            // Update selected state
            selectedAppId = appId;

            // Update card visual states
            var allCards = cardsContainer.querySelectorAll('.card');
            allCards.forEach(function(card) {
                if (card.dataset.id === appId) {
                    card.classList.add('selected');
                } else {
                    card.classList.remove('selected');
                }
            });

            // Find the selected app
            var selectedApp = playgroundData.apps.find(function(app) { return app.id === appId; });

            // Show area section if app has areas
            if (selectedApp && selectedApp.areas && selectedApp.areas.length > 0) {
                // Update section title based on app
                var sectionTitle = document.querySelector('.area-section-title');
                var isTask = appId === 'screenshot-to-code';
                sectionTitle.textContent = 'Select a task';

                // First, remove the visible class to reset the section
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');

                // Render area cards
                renderAreaSection(selectedApp.areas, isTask);

                // Force a reflow to ensure the browser processes the removal before adding
                areaSection.offsetHeight;

                // Add visible class on next frame to trigger animation
                requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    areaSection.classList.add('visible');
                });
            } else {
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');
            }
        }

        function selectBuildByArea() {
            // Toggle if clicking build-area again
            if (selectedAppId === 'build-area') {
                selectedAppId = null;
                var allCards = cardsContainer.querySelectorAll('.card');
                allCards.forEach(function(card) { card.classList.remove('selected'); });
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');
                // Show CTA description again when card is deselected
                var ctaDescription = document.querySelector('.area-cta-description');
                if (ctaDescription) {
                    ctaDescription.classList.remove('hidden');
                }
                return;
            }

            // Update selected state
            selectedAppId = 'build-area';

            // Update card visual states
            var allCards = cardsContainer.querySelectorAll('.card');
            allCards.forEach(function(card) {
                if (card.dataset.type === 'build-area') {
                    card.classList.add('selected');
                } else {
                    card.classList.remove('selected');
                }
            });

            // Collect all areas from all apps
            var allAreas = [];
            playgroundData.apps.forEach(function(app) {
                if (app.areas && app.areas.length > 0) {
                    allAreas = allAreas.concat(app.areas);
                }
            });

            // Show area section with all areas
            if (allAreas.length > 0) {
                // Remove visible class first to reset the section
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');

                // Render area cards
                renderAreaSection(allAreas);

                // Force a reflow
                areaSection.offsetHeight;

                // Add visible class on next frame
                requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    areaSection.classList.add('visible');
                });
            } else {
                areaSection.classList.remove('visible');
            }

        }

        function renderAreaSection(areas, isTask) {
            areaCardsContainer.innerHTML = areas.map(function(area) { return renderAreaCard(area, isTask); }).join('');
        }

        function render() {
            // Build HTML strings for performance (single DOM write)
            var cardsHTML = playgroundData.apps.map(function(app) { return renderAppCard(app); }).join('');
            cardsContainer.innerHTML = cardsHTML;

            // Hide area section initially - no auto-selection
            areaSection.classList.remove('visible');
            areaCardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
            selectedAppId = null;
        }

        function attachEventListeners() {
            // Event delegation for cards container
            cardsContainer.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                // Check if demo button was clicked
                var demoBtn = e.target.closest('.preview-demo-btn');
                if (demoBtn) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    var demoUrl = demoBtn.dataset.demoUrl;
                    var appId = demoBtn.dataset.appId;
                    // Also select the card so area section updates
                    if (appId) selectApp(appId);
                    if (demoUrl) {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('view_live_app', { appId: appId, demoUrl: demoUrl });
                    }
                    return;
                }

                var card = e.target.closest('.card');
                if (!card) return;

                // Hide CTA description when any card is clicked
                var ctaDescription = document.querySelector('.area-cta-description');
                if (ctaDescription) {
                    ctaDescription.classList.add('hidden');
                }

                var type = card.dataset.type;
                var id = card.dataset.id;

                if (type === 'app') {
                    selectApp(id);
                    window.myop_cta_handler('app_selected', { appId: id });
                } else if (type === 'build-area') {
                    selectBuildByArea();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('build_by_area_clicked', {});
                }
            });

            // Event delegation for area cards container
            areaCardsContainer.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                var card = e.target.closest('.area-card');
                if (!card) return;

                var areaId = card.dataset.id;
                window.myop_cta_handler('area_selected', {
                    appId: selectedAppId,
                    areaId: areaId
                });
            });

        }

        function initialize(data) {
            // Update preview images if provided
            if (data.previewImages) {
                PREVIEW_IMAGES = Object.assign({}, PREVIEW_IMAGES, data.previewImages);
            }

            playgroundData = {
                apps: data.apps || [],
                areas: data.areas || []
            };

            if (!isInitialized) {
                attachEventListeners();
                isInitialized = true;
            }

            render();
        }

        // Public API - exposed to window
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            // Getter mode - return current state
            if (!data) {
                return Object.assign({}, playgroundData);
            }

            // Initialize with data - synchronous rendering
            initialize(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
            console.log('[Playground CTA]', action_id, payload);
        };

        console.log('[Playground] Component ready');
    })();
    </script>
